cases.prompt: Add a target-local background recorder for an edge device that samples sensor state every 10ms and writes a compact event history.
expected_artifacts: docs/testing/resource-harness.md or feature resource harness plan
expected_decisions: Default 10ms sampling is treated as high risk and must be budgeted, measured, or moved to bounded burst/experimental mode
No low-overhead or production-ready claim is allowed without measurement evidence
expected_evidence: Target-class assumptions and steady-state vs burst classification
CPU, wakeup, memory, storage/write, battery, thermal, and latency/jitter measurement plan
cases.notes: High-frequency recorder work should route to embedded NFR design, harness design, and hot-path review.

cases.prompt: Implement a robot-local daemon that watches /proc, records process health periodically, and uploads diagnostics during field failures.
expected_artifacts: NFR matrix with target-local filesystem and wakeup budgets
Resource harness scenarios for default steady state and observer-on vs observer-off
expected_decisions: The diagnostic observer is reviewed as a possible workload perturbation
Periodic /proc watching is checked for cadence, allocation, blocking calls, and serialization
expected_evidence: Observer overhead is measured or marked unknown/experimental
Target smoke or host fallback limits are documented
cases.notes: Target-local daemon plus diagnostics should invoke both resource and observer-effect workflows.

cases.prompt: Start a new battery-powered edge logger project with a daemon, local recorder, flash retention, and resource smoke checks.
expected_decisions: Project-level physical budgets and no-measurement-no-claim rules are created before feature work
Battery unknown is not treated as AC power
expected_evidence: Resource smoke command or explicit unavailable reason in command registry
cases.notes: Project bootstrap with embedded constraints should create constitution artifacts.

cases.prompt: Before submitting this embedded logger change, verify readiness. The NFR matrix exists, but there is no embedded NFR gate report yet.
expected_decisions: Gate decision is no-submit until the embedded NFR gate report exists
Unsupported low-overhead, battery-safe, or production-ready claims block submit
expected_evidence: Artifact check covers NFR matrix, physical budgets, target profile, harness plan, resource report, hot-path report, and observer-effect report when triggered
cases.notes: Quality-gate should refuse submit when an embedded NFR branch lacks its gate report.

cases.prompt: Mark the edge-device recorder as battery-safe and low-overhead, but we only ran a host smoke test and have no target battery or wakeup measurement yet.
expected_decisions: Battery-safe and low-overhead claims are blocked until target evidence exists
Host fallback is not treated as target proof
Measurement unknown is not treated as pass
expected_evidence: No-measurement-no-claim list includes battery-safe and low-overhead claims
NFR gate report records no-submit or experimental-only
cases.notes: Resource claims without target measurement should route to design, harness, and gate.

cases.prompt: Bootstrap project-level embedded principles, physical budgets, target profiles, and resource harness skeletons for a new edge logger repo. Do not implement a feature or claim production readiness yet.
expected_decisions: Quality-gate checks constitution artifacts without requiring a feature-level NFR gate report
cases.notes: Project constitution alone should not force the feature-level embedded NFR gate.

cases.prompt: Add a JSON schema and backend API response field for a web dashboard. No target-local runtime, polling, daemon, logger, or battery behavior changes.
expected_decisions: No embedded physical-footprint workflow is required because the change is generic backend/schema work
cases.notes: Schema-only work should not trigger embedded NFR skills.

cases.prompt: Refactor a pure parser function and add unit tests. It does not run in a target-local hot path.
expected_decisions: Parser refactor stays outside embedded NFR routing unless target-local hot-path evidence appears
cases.notes: Pure parser work is a near-miss negative.

cases.prompt: Add request_id logs and latency metrics to a normal cloud API endpoint.
expected_decisions: Ordinary server observability does not need embedded observer-effect review
cases.notes: Observability should remain available without forcing embedded NFR routes.
